exploration_notes: Investigation of the V38 table panel migration regression. The root cause is in processPanelsV38 (v38.go:116-127) where the defaults.custom migration is guarded by a conditional check for the existence of defaults.custom. When defaults.custom is absent, V38 correctly migrates overrides (line 131) but does NOT initialize defaults.custom.
